text: Passing through the glass doors into this exhibition space, I am immediately struck by a blend of curiosity and awe. The design, brimming with color and abstraction, hints at human ingenuity and the pursuit of understanding. Reading the wall, I’m reminded of how technology serves as both tool and mirror, shaping and reflecting us. I feel a quiet anticipation, as if I stand on the threshold of possibility—a place where questions are as important as answers, and connection feels almost palpable.
